title: Podcast EP355: An Overview of the Q126 Electronic Design Market Data Report with Wally Rhines - Semiwiki
gist: Wally Rhines, CEO of Silvaco and industry coordinator for SEMI/ESD Alliance's EDMD data collection program, reports Q1 2026 EDA industry revenue grew 12.7% year-over-year to $5.7 billion, implying a $22.8 billion annual run rate, with a four-quarter moving average growth of 10.3%.

insights.claim: Q1 2026 EDA industry revenue grew 12.7% year-over-year to a total of $5.7 billion, equating to an annual run rate of $22.8 billion for the industry, according to the SEMI/Electronic System Design Alliance's Electronic Design Market Data (EDMD) report.
insights.speaker: Wally Rhines
insights.so_what: A verified $5.7B quarterly / $22.8B annualized EDA industry revenue figure with 12.7% YoY growth is a authoritative benchmark (compiled from nearly all major EDA vendors) for gauging overall chip-design tooling demand, a leading indicator for new design starts across the semiconductor industry.
insights.quote: Wally explains that Q1 2026 was another very good quarter for EDA at 12.7% growth compared to last year. Total revenue was $5.7B. That equates to an annual run rate for the industry of $22.8B.

insights.claim: The last four-quarter moving average for EDA industry growth was 10.3%, reflecting continuing demand for EDA software and IP to support a large number of chip and system designs in progress.
insights.speaker: Wally Rhines
insights.so_what: A 10.3% trailing four-quarter average growth rate (versus the 12.7% single-quarter figure) gives a smoothed baseline for EDA industry momentum, useful for distinguishing sustained trend growth from any single-quarter outperformance.
insights.quote: The last four-quarter moving average is 10.3% growth, reflecting the continuing demand for EDA software and IP to fuel the large number of chip and system designs in progress.
